response.justification: Exceptional candidate with 15+ years of full-stack experience including multiple staff-level roles. Current position at re:cinq with direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience directly addresses the required emerging skill. Strong TypeScript/Node.js foundation, demonstrated TDD culture, and full-stack capability across industries align well with core responsibilities. Primary gaps (Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright specifics) are framework-level knowledge addressable for someone of this caliber and seniority.
strengths: Current Staff Engineer role with direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator experience—exact match for required emerging skill
15+ years of full-stack TypeScript/Node.js across senior roles; demonstrated architecture and design capability at staff level
Strong testing/TDD culture throughout career with multiple training courses and workshops; open-source contributions show craftsmanship
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary framework requirement; requires onboarding verification
Vitest and Playwright testing frameworks absent from resume; background includes other frameworks but specific tools unverified
PostgreSQL/relational database experience not highlighted; recent work focuses on MongoDB; job emphasizes both relational and NoSQL

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure & MCP development at current role
TypeScript/Node.js mastery across multiple senior positions
Nest.js framework not demonstrated in work history
